blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
